mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hub_user_setting (user_id, auto_erp_apply, auto_news_collect) VALUES (#{userId}, FALSE, FALSE) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO hub_user_setting (user_id, auto_erp_apply, auto_news_collect, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{autoErpApply}, #{autoNewsCollect}, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET auto_erp_apply = EXCLUDED.auto_erp_apply, auto_news_collect = EXCLUDED.auto_news_collect, updated_at = NOW()
